요한복음 8:1.content: but Jesus went to the Mount of Olives.

요한복음 8:2.content: Now very early in the morning, he came again into the temple, and all the people came to him. He sat down and taught them.

요한복음 8:3.content: The scribes and the Pharisees brought a woman taken in adultery. Having set her in the middle,

요한복음 8:4.content: they told him, “Teacher, we found this woman in adultery, in the very act.

요한복음 8:5.content: Now in our law, Moses commanded us to stone such women. What then do you say about her?”

요한복음 8:6.content: They said this testing him, that they might have something to accuse him of. But Jesus stooped down and wrote on the ground with his finger.

요한복음 8:7.content: But when they continued asking him, he looked up and said to them, “He who is without sin among you, let him throw the first stone at her.”

요한복음 8:8.content: Again he stooped down and wrote on the ground with his finger.

요한복음 8:9.content: They, when they heard it, being convicted by their conscience, went out one by one, beginning from the oldest, even to the last. Jesus was left alone with the woman where she was, in the middle.

요한복음 8:10.content: Jesus, standing up, saw her and said, “Woman, where are your accusers? Did no one condemn you?”

요한복음 8:11.content: She said, “No one, Lord.” Jesus said, “Neither do I condemn you. Go your way. From now on, sin no more.”

요한복음 8:12.content: Again, therefore, Jesus spoke to them, saying, “I am the light of the world. He who follows me will not walk in the darkness, but will have the light of life.”

요한복음 8:13.content: The Pharisees therefore said to him, “You testify about yourself. Your testimony is not valid.”

요한복음 8:14.content: Jesus answered them, “Even if I testify about myself, my testimony is true, for I know where I came from, and where I am going; but you don’t know where I came from, or where I am going.

요한복음 8:15.content: You judge according to the flesh. I judge no one.

요한복음 8:16.content: Even if I do judge, my judgment is true, for I am not alone, but I am with the Father who sent me.

요한복음 8:17.content: It’s also written in your law that the testimony of two people is valid.

요한복음 8:18.content: I am one who testifies about myself, and the Father who sent me testifies about me.”

요한복음 8:19.content: They said therefore to him, “Where is your Father?” Jesus answered, “You know neither me nor my Father. If you knew me, you would know my Father also.”

요한복음 8:20.content: Jesus spoke these words in the treasury, as he taught in the temple. Yet no one arrested him, because his hour had not yet come.

요한복음 8:21.content: Jesus said therefore again to them, “I am going away, and you will seek me, and you will die in your sins. Where I go, you can’t come.”

요한복음 8:22.content: The Jews therefore said, “Will he kill himself, because he says, ‘Where I am going, you can’t come’?”

요한복음 8:23.content: He said to them, “You are from beneath. I am from above. You are of this world. I am not of this world.

요한복음 8:24.content: I said therefore to you that you will die in your sins; for unless you believe that I am he, you will die in your sins.”

요한복음 8:25.content: They said therefore to him, “Who are you?” Jesus said to them, “Just what I have been saying to you from the beginning.

요한복음 8:26.content: I have many things to speak and to judge concerning you. However he who sent me is true; and the things which I heard from him, these I say to the world.”

요한복음 8:27.content: They didn’t understand that he spoke to them about the Father.

요한복음 8:28.content: Jesus therefore said to them, “When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will know that I am he, and I do nothing of myself, but as my Father taught me, I say these things.

요한복음 8:29.content: He who sent me is with me. The Father hasn’t left me alone, for I always do the things that are pleasing to him.”

요한복음 8:30.content: As he spoke these things, many believed in him.

요한복음 8:31.content: Jesus therefore said to those Jews who had believed him, “If you remain in my word, then you are truly my disciples.

요한복음 8:32.content: You will know the truth, and the truth will make you free.”

요한복음 8:33.content: They answered him, “We are Abraham’s offspring, and have never been in bondage to anyone. How do you say, ‘You will be made free’?”

요한복음 8:34.content: Jesus answered them, “Most certainly I tell you, everyone who commits sin is the bondservant of sin.

요한복음 8:35.content: A bondservant doesn’t live in the house forever. A son remains forever.

요한복음 8:36.content: If therefore the Son makes you free, you will be free indeed.

요한복음 8:37.content: I know that you are Abraham’s offspring, yet you seek to kill me, because my word finds no place in you.

요한복음 8:38.content: I say the things which I have seen with my Father; and you also do the things which you have seen with your father.”

요한복음 8:39.content: They answered him, “Our father is Abraham.” Jesus said to them, “If you were Abraham’s children, you would do the works of Abraham.

요한복음 8:40.content: But now you seek to kill me, a man who has told you the truth which I heard from God. Abraham didn’t do this.

요한복음 8:41.content: You do the works of your father.” They said to him, “We were not born of sexual immorality. We have one Father, God.”

요한복음 8:42.content: Therefore Jesus said to them, “If God were your father, you would love me, for I came out and have come from God. For I haven’t come of myself, but he sent me.

요한복음 8:43.content: Why don’t you understand my speech? Because you can’t hear my word.

요한복음 8:44.content: You are of your father, the devil, and you want to do the desires of your father. He was a murderer from the beginning, and doesn’t stand in the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he speaks a lie, he speaks on his own; for he is a liar, and the father of lies.

요한복음 8:45.content: But because I tell the truth, you don’t believe me.

요한복음 8:46.content: Which of you convicts me of sin? If I tell the truth, why do you not believe me?

요한복음 8:47.content: He who is of God hears the words of God. For this cause you don’t hear, because you are not of God.”

요한복음 8:48.content: Then the Jews answered him, “Don’t we say well that you are a Samaritan, and have a demon?”

요한복음 8:49.content: Jesus answered, “I don’t have a demon, but I honor my Father and you dishonor me.

요한복음 8:50.content: But I don’t seek my own glory. There is one who seeks and judges.

요한복음 8:51.content: Most certainly, I tell you, if a person keeps my word, he will never see death.”

요한복음 8:52.content: Then the Jews said to him, “Now we know that you have a demon. Abraham died, as did the prophets; and you say, ‘If a man keeps my word, he will never taste of death.’

요한복음 8:53.content: Are you greater than our father, Abraham, who died? The prophets died. Who do you make yourself out to be?”

요한복음 8:54.content: Jesus answered, “If I glorify myself, my glory is nothing. It is my Father who glorifies me, of whom you say that he is our God.

요한복음 8:55.content: You have not known him, but I know him. If I said, ‘I don’t know him,’ I would be like you, a liar. But I know him and keep his word.

요한복음 8:56.content: Your father Abraham rejoiced to see my day. He saw it, and was glad.”

요한복음 8:57.content: The Jews therefore said to him, “You are not yet fifty years old! Have you seen Abraham?”

요한복음 8:58.content: Jesus said to them, “Most certainly, I tell you, before Abraham came into existence, I AM.”

요한복음 8:59.content: Therefore they took up stones to throw at him, but Jesus was hidden, and went out of the temple, having gone through the middle of them, and so passed by.
